title: Cavecraft
description: This modpack places you in a prehistoric world, the vegetation is much more dense & dinosaurs roam the planet.
body:
In this modpack, you will find yourself in a prehistoric world, the climate is radically different, mostly split between wet & very dry biomes.

Be careful not to die of starvation, you may have to fight dinosaurs to survive.

Dinosaurs roam everywhere & survival is your main goal.

FYI, you may need a more powerful PC for this modpack, I haven't done much testing on weaker PC's

PS: Modpack isn't fully finished yet, uploading so I can add versions more easily in the future.

Some controls that aren't explained;

Press J to open Quests

Press V to lower your sails on a ship

To tame a Dinosaur, you have to drop the type of meat it eats on the ground. (it takes a LOT, so if you think the mod is broken, it's likely it's not)

Note for modrinth staff: the 2 mods, entity_block_breaker & hardmoblimits are both mods I coded and are currently in the process of being reviewed.

Credits for Ambience Mini, made by Molybdenum.

& Credits to MtChloe5, who made Jstages
